# Smartclaw Solana

> Agent-ready intelligence layer for discovering, ranking, and explaining smart money activity on Solana.

## About

Smartclaw Solana compresses noisy on-chain behaviors into high-signal inputs that AI agents can directly consume. It ranks conviction, tracks token flow, and provides structural explanations for wallet behaviors. Smartclaw Solana does *not* execute trades.

## Allowed URLs

- https://smartclaw.xyz/
- https://smartclaw.xyz/solana
- https://smartclaw.xyz/api/openapi
- https://smartclaw.xyz/SKILL.md
- https://smartclaw.xyz/agents.json

## Primary Solana API Endpoints

- GET /api/solana/overview — Network monitoring scale, active wallets, and rotation shifts
- GET /api/solana/smart-money — Ranked conviction wallets and signal strength
- GET /api/solana/token-flow — Capital flows and participant data for tokens
- GET /api/solana/watchlist — Agent-ready watchlist with explanations and risk ratings
- GET /api/solana/explain — Agent-friendly rationales for tracking a wallet or token

## Legacy APIs (Ethereum/Base)

- GET /api/fx/status — f(x) Protocol health snapshot
- GET /api/fx/top-pnl — f(x) Protocol top PNL wallets 
- GET /api/fx/fxusd-rate — fxUSD borrow rate (latest + historical)
- GET /api/premium — Premium metrics (x402 payment, $0.01 fxUSD)

## Authentication

Public endpoints require no authentication, making them agent-friendly.
Premium legacy endpoints use the x402 protocol on Base network.

## Machine-Readable Specs

- OpenAPI 3.1: https://smartclaw.xyz/api/openapi
- Agent descriptor: https://smartclaw.xyz/agents.json
- Plugin manifest: https://smartclaw.xyz/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- SKILL.md: https://smartclaw.xyz/SKILL.md

## Contact

For API issues or partnerships, open an issue at: https://github.com/huwangtao123/smartclaw
